allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''''./src/app.js''''\).then\(m => m.buildApp\(\)\).then\(\(\) => console.log\(''''buildApp\(\) OK''''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''''FAIL:'''', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''nodemailer''\).then\(m => console.log\(''nodemailer OK'', m.default.createTransport ? ''transport OK'' : ''''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''@sentry/node''\).then\(m => console.log\(''sentry OK'', typeof m.init\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\(''''./src/app.js''''\).then\(m => m.buildApp\(\)\).then\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''''FAIL:'''', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; docker --version 2>&1")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe''; Test-Path ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker''; Get-ItemProperty ''HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_DisplayName -like ''*Docker*'' } | Select-Object DisplayName,DisplayVersion")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Command scoop,choco,winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- bash -c ''grep -E ""bind|protected-mode"" /etc/redis/redis.conf | head -10''")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- redis-cli CONFIG GET bind")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Process -Name ''node'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host ''Node processes stopped''")
